message:
perf: allocate arena in low 44-bit address range for zero-cost pointer compression

On Linux x86_64, request arena at hint address 0x10_0000_0000 (64GB) so
it falls within the 44-bit PTR_ADDR_MASK. When successful, compressed_heap_base
stays 0 and compressPtr/decompressPtr use the fast path (addr & MASK) with
no extern var access — matching macOS ARM64 performance characteristics.
